zh.Whitney, Herefordshire, England: 英國英格蘭賀福爾特尼--也
zh.Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United: 英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德
zh.Radnorshire, Wales, United Kingdom: 英國威爾斯拉德諾斯爾
zh.Whitney on Wye, Hereford, Herefordshire,: 英國英格蘭賀福爾特尼--也
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Whitney II於1393年出生在英國賀福爾特尼--也時，他的父親Robert de Whitney54歲，母親Mary Cromwell42歲。他於大約1404年與Gwenllian Oldcastle在英國英格蘭賀福爾特尼--也結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1412年登記服兵役。他於1413年被列為sheriff of herefordshire。他去世於1443年3月12日在英國英格蘭賀福爾特尼--也享年50歲。

zh-hans.Whitney on Wye, Hereford, Herefordshire,: 英国英格兰賀福爾特尼--也
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Whitney II于1393年出生在英国賀福爾特尼--也时，他的父亲Robert de Whitney54岁，母亲Mary Cromwell42岁。他于大约1404年与Gwenllian Oldcastle在英国英格兰賀福爾特尼--也结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1412年登记服兵役。他于1413年被列为sheriff of herefordshire。他去世于1443年3月12日在英国英格兰賀福爾特尼--也享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Whitney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Whitney in Herefordshire, the etymology of which is uncertain. The second element is Old English ēg ‘island, piece of higher ground in a low-lying area’; the first appears to be hwītan, which is either the genitive singular of an Old English byname Hwīta (meaning ‘white’), or the weak dative case (originally used after a preposition and article) of the adjective hwīt ‘white’. The name may also derive from Whitney (now Whitney Wood) in Stevenage (Hertfordshire), probably named from Old English hwītan ‘white’ + (ge)hæge ‘enclosure’.
History: John Whitney came from London, England, to Watertown, MA, in 1635, and had numerous prominent descendents.

variants.name: Witney
meanings: English: habitational name from Witney in Oxfordshire, which for centuries was a centre of the wool trade, famous in particular for the manufacture of blankets. The placename derives from the Old English personal name Witta (genitive Wittan) + Old English ēg, īeg ‘island’. There may have been some confusion with Whitney .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Whitney II was born in 1393, in Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England, his father, Robert de Whitney, was 54 and his mother, Mary Cromwell, was 42. He married Gwenllian Oldcastle about 1404, in Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1412. In 1413, at the age of 20, his occupation is listed as sheriff of herefordshire. He died on 12 March 1443, in Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Whitney II est né en 1393, à Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Whitney, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Mary Cromwell, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Gwenllian Oldcastle environ 1404, à Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1412. En 1413, à l’âge de 20 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of herefordshire. Il est décédé le 12 mars 1443, à Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Whitney II 1393 in Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Whitney 54 und seine Mutter Mary Cromwell 42. Er hat um 1404 in Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Gwenllian Oldcastle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1412 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1413, als er 20 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of herefordshire aufgeführt. Er starb am 12. März 1443 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Whitney II è nato il nel 1393 nel Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Whitney, aveva 54 anni e il suo madre, Mary Cromwell, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Gwenllian Oldcastle circa 1404, nel Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1412. Nel 1413, all'età di 20 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of herefordshire. Morì il 12 marzo 1443, nel Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Whitney IIが1393年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィトニー-オン-ウイで生まれた時，父Robert de Whitneyは54歳，母Mary Cromwellは42歳であった。約1404年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィトニー-オン-ウイでGwenllian Oldcastleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1412年に兵役登録をした。1413年，20歳の時，職業はsheriff of herefordshireと記録されている。彼は1443年3月12日にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィトニー-オン-ウイで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Whitney II(이)가 1393년 영국 허퍼드실르 휘트니--w예에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Whitney(은)는 54세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Cromwell(은)는 42세였다. 그는 대략 1404년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 휘트니--w예에서 Gwenllian Oldcastle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1412년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1413년, 20세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of herefordshire이었다. 그는 1443년 3월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 휘트니--w예에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Whitney II nasceu em 1393, em Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Whitney, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Mary Cromwell, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Gwenllian Oldcastle aproximadamente 1404, em Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1412. Em 1413, com 20 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of herefordshire. Ele faleceu em 12 de março de 1443, em Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Whitney II родился в 1393 г. в местности уитни-он-ви, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Whitney было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Cromwell, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwenllian Oldcastle около 1404 г. в местности уитни-он-ви, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1412 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1413 году, в возрасте 20 лет, работал по профессии sheriff of herefordshire. Он умер 12 марта 1443 г. в местности уитни-он-ви, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Whitney II nació en 1393, en Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Whitney, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Mary Cromwell, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Gwenllian Oldcastle aproximadamente 1404, en Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1412. En 1413, a la edad de 20 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of herefordshire. Murió el 12 de marzo de 1443, en Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años.
